sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports pain in the left hand, describing it as sharp and intermittent. He also reports difficulty swallowing and pain. The patient reports pain in his abdomen.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is 120/80 mmHg. Heart rate is 78 bpm. Temperature is 98.6°F. Neurological exam is unremarkable.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's symptoms are consistent with musculoskeletal pain and dysphagia. No acute findings are present.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Order blood work to assess kidney function. Order an eye referral to ophthalmology. Order a hemoglobin A1c test. Recommend starting the patient on prilosec. Continue metformin 500 milligrams twice a day. Recommend continuing metformin monthly.
